headline: IPG Photonics, Western Digital, and Skyworks Solutions Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the CPI print of 4.2% annual inflation (the hottest since 2023) revived the rate hike narrative.
